title: White House rationale for war keeps shifting
summary_full: The president and top aides have offered varying justifications for attacking Iran — from regime change to preemption to eliminating its nuclear program and ballistic missiles.
summary_public: The president and top aides have offered varying justifications for attacking Iran — from regime change to preemption to eliminating its nuclear program and ballistic missiles.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: White House rationale for war keeps shifting
